name: Team Kennedy
subject: BREAKING: Conservative Judges Enforce Trump Immigration Wealth Test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902a8/55b66746/22505cd8/80f85cc/4255025180/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | News just broke that our conservative-packed Supreme Court ruled to enforce a Trump proposal to make it even harder for immigrants to become citizens -- especially if they are poor or sick, struggling or suffering. _**Our system has been rigged and is being used as a political arm of the president.**_ A full quarter of the federal judges in our system today were rushed through by Mitch McConnell and his lawless President. Our court system should be based on justice and the law. Not political ideology. **We can't let this continue. We can't let our court system become a political arm.** [**Sign your name: Demand term limits for Supreme Court Justices**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902a8/55b66746/22505cd8/80f85cd/4255025180/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/court-term-limits/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-court-term-limits-email") [Sign Now](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902a8/55b66746/22505cd8/80f85cd/4255025180/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/court-term-limits/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-court-term-limits-email") We can't let this continue. We need term limits on Supreme Court Justices. -Team Kennedy |

name: Team Tina
subject: Chaos and commotion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina is fighting as hard as she can to deliver results for the American people while fighting off the GOP's attacks at every turn.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200127-eom9?refcode=em200127-eom9&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

Tina is hard at work in the Senate fighting for the everyday folks the GOP continues to leave behind. She is fighting tooth and nail to lower prescription drug costs and expand quality health care. She is working to tackle the climate crisis, defend reproductive freedom, and SO much more.

**No matter what, Tina is fighting as hard as she can to deliver results for the American people while fighting off the GOP's attacks at every turn.**

As you can imagine, that leaves her with very little time to worry about fundraising, which means our numbers have taken a pretty significant dip, and we'll need to work twice as hard just to catch up during this critical election year.

**Will you add a contribution of $10 or more toward Tina's re-election campaign before our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2020 to keep her in the Senate fighting for us? You can donate right here:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200127-eom9?refcode=em200127-eom9&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

We can't let the chaos and commotion coming out of Washington distract us from what we're fighting for. Let's make sure we don't look back and wish we did more to keep Tina in the Senate.

Counting on you.

-- Team Tina

February 3 marks the first contest of this primary, the Iowa caucuses -- and this grassroots movement we've built together over the past year will be put to the test.

But before things kick into high gear, we wanted to take a moment to commemorate how far we've come together. That's why we're offering a special pin to members of this grassroots team who have been in this fight from the start.

**[Do you want one? This is a limited-edition enamel pin just for top supporters who are willing to chip in and say they're all in for Elizabeth before the first votes are counted.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The 3 things Democrats can’t change
body:
They have no choice but to distract you: Their actual impeachment case is a historically weak partisan hit job. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a40be07bd9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 27, 2020
---
| | |
# **The 3 things Democrats can’t change**

**House Democrats** have tried almost everything by this point. They’ve left no stone unturned in their effort to, as Impeachment Manager Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA) put it, “send that charlatan in the White House back to the golden throne he came from."

**That promise **came during his supposedly impartial impeachment probe, by the way.

**Watch** : [House Democrats tell one story. Their evidence tells another. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a4d924fbb&e=3ee4985eea)

**Each day** comes with a new diversion, as Democrat leaders and their media surrogates try to distract you from the case at hand. They have no choice: The House’s Articles of Impeachment are historically weak, undermined from the start by a sham investigation more focused on politics than justice. Their only hope is to change the story.

**It won’t work** , because 3 facts are staying the same no matter what stunts they pull.

**First, the impeachment inquiry** itself was unauthorized and unconstitutional. Breaking with historical precedent, the probe began long before the House was even permitted to vote on it. Instead, Speaker Nancy Pelosi simply announced the inquiry with a press conference. It’s the only impeachment in American history to begin that way.

**From there, Democrat-led** House committees began issuing subpoenas with the unconstitutional demand that White House officials provide closed-door testimony _without_ the right to executive branch counsel. House Democrats threw 150 years of precedent out the window, denying President Trump the basic due-process protections afforded to both Presidents Nixon and Clinton.

**Second** , **their whole case** is irreparably damaged by the person leading it. Adam Schiff, who supervised the “investigation,” should actually be called as a fact witness in the case. Far from a neutral referee, he and his team coordinated with the very whistleblower at the center of the Ukraine probe— _before_ the complaint was even filed.

**Even worse** , he lied about it, earning 4 Pinocchios from _The Washington Post_ fact-checkers for his attempt to cover it up. Schiff’s involvement in orchestrating this sham impeachment makes it obvious he should never have been in charge of investigating it.

**Third, and most important** : President Trump did nothing wrong, let alone broke the law.

**Multiple witnesses** affirmed that President Trump was right to worry about corruption in Ukraine. The President’s “deeply rooted” view of past Ukrainian corruption was a “reasonable position,” Ambassador Kurt Volker testified. “Most people who know anything about Ukraine would think that.”

**That’s true.** And despite Democrats’ insistence that even _looking into_ Burisma and the Bidens was “baseless”—indeed, impeachable—the facts say otherwise. Here’s [just a partial list](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad45b09ba8&e=3ee4985eea) of the people and organizations who found enough basis to look into it: the Obama State Department, _The New York Times_ , _The Washington Post_ , ABC’s White House reporter, the United Kingdom’s Serious Fraud Office, Hunter Biden’s business partner Chris Heinz, Deputy Assistant Secretary of State George Kent, and many more.

**The bottom line** is that a President has both the right and the responsibility to protect American taxpayers from foreign corruption, including in Ukraine. If the American people disagree with that policy decision, they have every right to say so—at the ballot box.

**Democrats want** **to take** that right away from you. They’re afraid of what you might say.

[FACT CHECK: Even ABC News thought there was a basis to look into this.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b803c4057d&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch** : [Fastest impeachment in history . . . followed by the longest delay](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c9f405802&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8908a2aa4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a916e23113&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=652cb3c41a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: We've been working hard to earn HD 113's support. Take a look at how!
body:
We will flip HD 113 red in November. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=4f010155df&u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d4f3c8ff87)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e141163396&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to give you an update on our campaign.

Despite being the only Republican running for HD 113, we are not sitting on our hands waiting for November. We are already doing the hard work of meeting voters and engaging with the community. Just this weekend alone we went to half a dozen events across the district!
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0089d3a9fe&e=4f010155df)
---
[ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=62f34abb1a&e=4f010155df)
---
| We started the weekend by sliding over to Sunnyvale to check out their new elementary school building, then ended the day by celebrating incredible leadership at the Garland Chamber of Commerce’s annual banquet. We honored great community leaders like Paul Mayer and welcomed the new president of the board, Anita Collins.
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=4712828d3b&e=4f010155df)
---
[ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2563f7cd0b&e=4f010155df)
---
| Then on Saturday we had a crazy statewide day of action by knocking on hundreds of doors. We started in Mesquite and refueled at Catfish Cove (my personal favorite) and then went to Garland to talk to voters out there! If you’d like to blockwalk with us in the future [**please sign up on our website.**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=c75beb99ab&e=4f010155df)
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f496252d39&e=4f010155df)
---
[ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=97544cff48&e=4f010155df)
---
| And finally it was great meeting and talking to business leaders this weekend in Rowlett at the Roaring 20’s themed 41st annual Rowlett Chamber of Commerce Banquet. Thank you to Hella Shriner Temple for hosting!
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=03be2b25cb&e=4f010155df)
---
| We're not just leading in terms of engaging with voters, but thanks to y'all's generous support we are in a strong financial position to take the fight to Rhetta's liberal money machine in November. Please help us keep up the momentum by [**donating a few dollars on our website!**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2d5247fd08&e=4f010155df)

Our campaign has the grassroots energy and the conservative Texas values it will take to win this race. Thank you for all your support and everything you do for liberty.

For Texas,
[](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=6eb54d2065&e=4f010155df)
Will Douglas

“The most important thing is you must put everybody on notice that you’re here and you are for real.” - Kobe Bryant

---

Will Douglas for TexasPO Box 496955Garland, TX 75049-6955

| | John Bolton's manuscript for his forthcoming book has leaked, and it definitely states that Trump tied Ukraine's aid to an investigation from the start, contradicting the many statements he and his defense team have made. But GOP senators don't seem to be paying attention to the news, or the trial for that matter. MSNBC host Rachel Maddow chastised senators unable to stay awake or otherwise be present for the impeachment trials. She called on them to set a better example of civic duty, take their jobs seriously, and listen to the case being presented before them. Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP have repeatedly not taken the trial seriously, dismissing it before it began. Now, they're digging in deeper, trying to discredit Bolton before the Senate even votes on witnesses. 2020 is the most important election of our lifetime.

In order to beat Donald Trump -- and tackle the systemic issues that got him to the White House in the first place -- it's going to take the strongest grassroots movement that our country has ever seen.

Elizabeth understands the urgency of this moment in our history -- and she's fighting to unify our country to meet this moment. And now that the election year has begun, there is a massive amount of work ahead of us if we're going to win this election.

**So this morning, we launched our biggest fundraising goal to date: raising $3.5 million between now and our January 31 FEC deadline. That's what it's going to take to start 2020 in the strongest position possible and keep our plans to win on track.**

**[If there were ever a time for every grassroots supporter to step up, it's now. Please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help hit this big goal and ensure Elizabeth has the resources to continue building this winning campaign.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a1cb/45c30650/1e6218fa5/66e1aa3c/2018975381/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4ySkZfRU9NX0xBVV9UXzIwMjAwMTI3X1YyUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN2JF_EOM_LAU_T_20200127_V2S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Let me explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Please read tonight.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6487%2E377263%2EkzWF0p)
Yang Gang, I hope you can let me explain why I need to make an ask of you in this moment. [After you read, please pitch in $10 or more tonight.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23691?t=5&akid=6487%2E377263%2EkzWF0p)

We set a big goal on Saturday of raising $3 million before our FEC deadline on Friday night, and without a big jump in our numbers there’s no way we can hit it.

This goal is absolutely critical to keeping our momentum and staying competitive on the ground here in Iowa and in all the early states. Just this week we saw increased spending from the top candidates, and we’re starting to be dramatically outspent.

**The team and I are doing everything we can on the ground here to build support, but we need your help, Yang Gang. We know we cannot go into 2020 with the same establishment politicians who created these problems in the first place.**

The stakes are too high and our momentum is building too fast to lose it all over the final days. **Please, pitch in $10 or more tonight:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/3million-goal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23691?t=6) **

This is our moment,

-Andrew | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23691?t=7&akid=6487%2E377263%2EkzWF0p)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6487%2E377263%2EkzWF0p) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6487%2E377263%2EkzWF0p) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Our new ad defending President Trump
body:
It's time for the impeachment sham and witch hunt to come to an end. Peter,We just released our new TV ad defending President Trump!It's time for the impeachment sham and witch hunt to come to an end. I'm proud to be endorsed by President Trump, and I'm ready to take on the Do Nothing Democrats and put America first. name: Cheri Bustos, DCCC Chairwoman
subject: Raising the stakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Team, One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairwoman of the DCCC is meeting with the incredible challenger candidates from across the country. These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I’m honored to be working with them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14373758/150656823/64003216?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.28_b1_cb_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTBjMWJkYy1kZTQxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dHzXKa28vFCD_gfHppgQlksfI3PM_2dGmPZZL3F42cs=) Team,

One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairwoman of the DCCC is meeting with the incredible challenger candidates from across the country. These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I’m honored to be working with them.

I’ve gotten to know Eugene DePasquale well, and I can confidently say that he is exactly the type of leader that PA-10 deserves to have fighting for them in Washington. **That’s why I’m so proud to announce that we’ve named him to our highly competitive Red to Blue program.**

Eugene is primed to tackle the tough task of flipping this seat from red to blue, but he needs your help to do it.

[**Will you make a $10 grassroots contribution right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14373759/150656824/-2071845119?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.28_b1_cb_all&amount=10&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTBjMWJkYy1kZTQxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dHzXKa28vFCD_gfHppgQlksfI3PM_2dGmPZZL3F42cs=)

**Now that we’ve raised the stakes by placing Eugene’s campaign at the center of our offensive battlefield, Washington special interests will stop at nothing to defeat him -- including spending huge sums of money on misleading attack ads.**

Eugene is running a true people-powered campaign, so he is relying on support from folks like you to win big on Election Day and restore real leadership to their communities. [**That’s why it’s so important for you to pitch in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14373760/150656825/-2071845119?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.28_b1_cb_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTBjMWJkYy1kZTQxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dHzXKa28vFCD_gfHppgQlksfI3PM_2dGmPZZL3F42cs=)

Thank you for everything,

These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I’m honored to be working with them. = Team, One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairwoman of the DCCC is meeting with the incredible challenger candidates from across the country. These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I’m honored to be working with them. I’ve gotten to know Eugene DePasquale well, and I can confidently say that he is exactly the type of leader that PA-10 deserves to have fighting for them in Washington. That’s why I’m so proud to announce that we’ve named him to our highly competitive Red to Blue program. Eugene is primed to tackle the tough task of flipping this seat from red to blue, but he needs your help to do it. = Now that we’ve raised the stakes by placing Eugene’s campaign at the center of our offensive battlefield, Washington special interests will stop at nothing to defeat him -- including spending huge sums of money on misleading attack ads. name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 1/27
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! I started the week in Cumberland County. We went from Knox County to Loudon County to Claiborne County to Jefferson County and to Hawkins County. Folks in East Tennessee have been incredibly supportive of our campaign and I really appreciate it. This week, I am back on the road, criss-crossing the state again. I will be in Knox County, Sullivan County, Hawkins County, Washington County, Lewis County, Wayne County and Lawrence County. I am thankful for all your support and everything you have done. I hope to see you out on the campaign trail. [Click here to see where we're going next!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-y/) **News:** Last week I stopped by Crossville to meet with Mayor of Cumberland County, Allen Foster. I really appreciate the time he took to meet with me. [Read about it here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-j/) In case you missed it, we released an ad about my faith and how I came to know Christ. Click the link to watch our ad! [Watch Our Ad Here! ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-t/) **Social Media:** I went to Jefferson County to start a busy Saturday and was pleased to see some good friends of mine! I enjoyed speaking with Mayor Mark Potts, Representative Jeremy Faison, and Congressman Tim Burchett. I really enjoyed speaking in the Jefferson County courtroom before an awesome Meet & Greet in Hawkins County. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-i/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-d/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-h/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our next Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-k/) [Pick up your Dr. Manny gear today! We have t-shirts and bumper stickers available with a donation. ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-u/) We have just over 6 months until the primary election. I can't do this without your support. Together we can make a different kind of difference! Dr. Manny P.S. [W](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-o/)[o](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhgirkl-uunkhiuw-b/)[uld you consider chipping in? | NH Democrats are at it again trying to stomp on our Second Amendment Rights! Liberal Democrat Senators Jeanne Dietsch and Jay Kahn have proposed a bill, SB 469, which would **use local noise ordinances to force gun clubs and other shooting ranges out of business**. NH Senate Republicans are doing their best to fend off these liberal, unconstitutional bills, but we need your help! "Gun clubs are important organizations in our communities, offering important firearms safety courses and allowing Granite Staters to use their firearms in a safe environment. New Hampshire is one of the safest states in the nation and our current gun laws are effective as they are. We should not be passing legislation that closes gun ranges; that would make New Hampshire less safe,” \- Senator Sharon Carson (R-Londonderry)

body:
35 days to go – ACT NOW to defeat the swamp politicians! >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/44aeb573a87b7313/8341dffb194aff78c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, We have just 35 days to go now until the Republican primary, and it’s neck and neck.

In fact, one recent poll shows me trailing Jeff Sessions by four points.

I know you agree, Peter: **The LAST thing Alabama needs is another career politician in the U.S. Senate who will not stand with President Trump!**

It’s now or never. If we don’t give our all, we could fall short on March 3rd.

[**Please rush a generous contribution today to sustain our fight**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/44aeb573a87b7313/d5aa32f80889ff4ac3d6b838967d376c/33013)

Online support has been critical to our efforts... and when you donate $5 or more before our end-of-month deadline, we’ll add your name to our donor wall in the campaign office! [ Get your name on the wall! Donate $5 or more >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/44aeb573a87b7313/faee6443ba877966c3d6b838967d376c/33013) At the same time that swamp Republicans are rallying around Jeff Sessions, the far-left impeachment-obsessed Democrats are going all out to prop up Doug Jones. Right now, he has more than $5 MILLION at the ready to keep this seat in Chuck Schumer’s hands on Election Day 2020!

**Whether it’s $5, $50, or $500, every donation will help us reach more voters and build the grassroots momentum we need to win**.

Don’t wait. Don’t let the establishment insiders derail our campaign to send a no-nonsense, Trump-supporting CONSERVATIVE to the U.S. Senate. I’m counting on you now.

**[Follow this link to help us reach our January end-of-month goal!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/44aeb573a87b7313/71556c72d345269bc3d6b838967d376c/33013) **

body:

Dear Friends,

We have great news; _**our campaign has made it past the $100,000 mark!**_ This is because of you! It will take all of us to unseat socialist DeFazio.

DeFazio has ignored Oregon's values for far too long. By donating to our campaign we are showing him his time in the House of Representatives is coming to an end.

If you want to help continue this momentum [donate $25.00 today](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54214529:sawCYhvaN:m:1:2214761648:2B122D3AD5EFF1A739AEF801CCE49C12:r)!

Alek Skarlatos

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Last Chance: Congress of Counties Starts This Friday!
body:
We can’t rest on our laurels – we need our full Republican team trained-up to keep Indiana’s momentum rolling and to win races this year in every... |
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5debb1d183&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Last Chance:
_Congress of Counties Starts THIS Friday!_**
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We can’t rest on our laurels – we need our full Republican team skilled-up to compete in and WIN races this year in every corner of Indiana. More Republican election victories will keep Indiana's momentum rolling!

And the best way to make sure our full team has the skills to win? **Attend Congress of Counties this weekend!**
\--> [Register now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c55a913a00&e=1acd9bb3d6) <\--
[Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff2b39c98c&e=1acd9bb3d6) is our party's two-day training and networking event for the entire Republican team. We'll have breakout sessions on important election related topics -- ranging from election administration to fundraising to using data and more -- but that's not all. We've also got a fun reception on Friday night, a lunch featuring Governor Holcomb on Saturday, and a whole lot more! **The information you'll gain this weekend is the information you need to ****achieve**** victory with your campaign, local party, or plans to run in the future.**

And if you can't join us for all of Congress of Counties, don't worry...we've also got some [separate registration options](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a7f5467763&e=1acd9bb3d6) for events on Friday and Saturday.

Don't hesitate, [REGISTER](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8c23960ba3&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4fed87fb62&e=1acd9bb3d6), and come join us THIS Friday before it's too late! You aren't going to want to miss this! See you Friday, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer
\--> [Register now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f351227230&e=1acd9bb3d6) <\--

name: SAVE PUBLIC RADIO
subject: 🎤 We MUST save NPR 🎤
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| | **BREAKING:** The Trump administration is attacking YOUR First Amendment rights by threatening to DEFUND NPR!

**_This is an blatant attack on journalism and objective facts because a journalist used facts in an interview with Mike Pompeo._**

[We need to show the Trump administration that we believe in Freedom of the Press and objective facts->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40e3/4bd7760e/46bfc02f/77acbe1b/1657140060/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/save-npr?firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+show+the+Trump+administration&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&source=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&refcode=314_EM_PT_90D1xAT_200121_1_3") | | _[Save NPR](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40e3/4bd7760e/46bfc02f/77acbe1a/1657140060/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/save-npr?firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Save+NPR&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&source=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&refcode=314_EM_PT_90D1xAT_200121_1_3")_
---
Last weekend, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo erupted at an NPR reporter during a normal interview, and President Trump retweeted a Fox News host who called for NPR to be DEFUNDED!!

Millions of well-informed Americans depend on NPR as their source of news and information.

NPR has...
* 120 million monthly listeners
* 34 Bureaus worldwide
* 27.4 million weekly on-air listeners

NPR is also the national syndicator for a network of OVER 1,000 public radio stations across the country.

_The Trump administration is not just attacking NPR; they are attacking our right to be informed._

[That is why it is critical to send a message to the Trump administration. We need your help to show the Trump administration that we believe in Freedom of the Press and objective facts->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40e3/4bd7760e/46bfc02f/77acbe19/1657140060/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/save-npr?firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+it+is+critical+to+send+a+mes&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&source=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&refcode=314_EM_PT_90D1xAT_200121_1_3")
| _[Save NPR](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40e3/4bd7760e/46bfc02f/77acbe18/1657140060/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/save-npr?firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Save+NPR&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&source=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&refcode=314_EM_PT_90D1xAT_200121_1_3")_
---
Thank you for defending public radio,

314 Action

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40e3/4bd7760e/46bfc02f/77acbe67/1657140060/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NmJmYzAyZiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0MGUzIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/46bfc02f/29bb40e3?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&source=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&refcode=314_EM_PT_90D1xAT_200121_1_3")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40e3/4bd7760e/46bfc02f/77acbe66/1657140060/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3&source=314_EM_PT_90D1xATOP_200121_1_3")** to make a donation.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump tweets a not-so-subtle threat at Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Adam Schiff: "If the truth doesn't matter, we're lost. "Framers couldn't protect us from ourselves, if right and truth don't matter. "And you know that what he did was not right. You know, that's what they do in the old country, that Colonel Vindman's father came from. Or the old country that my great grandfather came from, or the old countries that your ancestors came from, or maybe you came from. But here, right is supposed to matter. It's what's made us the greatest nation on earth. No constitution can protect us if right doesn't matter anymore. "And you know you can't trust this president to do what's right for this country. You can trust he will do what's right for Donald Trump. "He'll do it now. He's done it before. He'll do it for the next several months. "He'll do it in the election if he's allowed to. "This is why, if you find him guilty, you must find that he should be removed. Because right matters. Because right matters, and the truth matters. Otherwise, we are lost." **Should Trump be removed from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfac/6e9863e8/828eb97/1db06c6f/1084279478/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/_9bOUZZX") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfac/6e9863e8/828eb97/1db06c6f/1084279478/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/_9bOUZZX") Thank you for your response, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfac/6e9863e8/828eb97/1db06c6f/1084279478/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/_9bOUZZX")
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Why?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Minnesota is a sore spot for Trump, so his campaign is doing everything they can to win here this November.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200128-eom10?refcode=em200128-eom10&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

My Republican opponent, Jason Lewis, is pulling out all the stops to defeat me and give Donald Trump another rubber stamp in Washington.

To make matters worse, Trump himself has pledged to return to Minnesota to shore up his right-wing base.

Why? Because Trump is intent on winning our state after losing it by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016. Minnesota is a sore spot for him, which is why his campaign is doing everything they can -- including spending up to $30 million -- to prevent Minnesota from slipping through their fingers again.

Look, I don't have a giant war chest funded by GOP mega-donors or right-wing special interests like Donald Trump or Mitch McConnell. And believe me, that's the last thing I want. I intend to win this race the right way with support from folks like you, so I'm asking:

**Will you add a contribution ahead of our first monthly fundraising deadline of 2020? To win this race, keep our state blue, and make sure Democrats can flip the Senate this year, I'm counting on you to chip in any amount you can afford right now.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200128-eom10?refcode=em200128-eom10&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: Sara's thoughts on this Senate impeachment trial [VIDEO]
body:
Watch her video now ->
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee3/4bef7a87/6a84a62b/287fb67a/481079590/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Sara recorded this video for all her supporters, to make sure you're kept up to date on the impeachment proceedings and how our current Senate is failing us.
**[Watch her video and then add your donation here-> ](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee3/4bef7a87/6a84a62b/287fb679/481079590/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dtc-200128?refcode=em200128-1-full&noskip=true")**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee3/4bef7a87/6a84a62b/287fb679/481079590/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dtc-200128?refcode=em200128-1-full&noskip=true")
Sara's right -- this impeachment trial shouldn't be a political game. But things will only change if we win in Maine and kick Mitch McConnell out as Majority Leader.
Keep fighting,
Team Sara

name: Matt G. Campaign Manager, Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
subject: Help Us Get Brian On The Ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
It’s that time of the year again! Petition circulation efforts are underway, and we are going to need your help to keep this seat and take the gavel o
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=adc1e439edd042fbb088cc1e6cbde45d&_e=RD2J3yqd9S8wWVeBh7EpQWJrBAR157xQiWYBRY9qfyNEhQs7FgkTiduWZvvmmX8FRQHwHl9RaEHeY5rqS9apdYmHVUGs38j5VlhHHuPy6xeaQx91SQtd1rEPGO3u-cAEX8vhKNtbKVhK8zMpsNwseZyu9-CpQsH4qm_QTM390ZqmI1D5VyCnYnmlYGMBhH7EwoK5X5ltxGBH2kUC2TDUxpTziqpe8zt4JEGGky-CpU-0VDb8CB9mKZ7YLCWc0eNfrkg7YPPw5pDP1O5dVwQ0-JW9qkJ0Pvusg6f-8f_BlgOaDsIWgqyYDjuJaASAn4ld_n4yAdyar2XWS5W37CgXZcibH5nNYzu784DJ9WugyyWi_neUOtIU6Z38XxHAmbk8) Friend, It’s that time of the year again! Petition circulation efforts are underway, and we are going to need your help to keep this seat and take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi’s hands.
**This election is critical** , and we need Brian Fitzpatrick back on the ballot to help stop the socialist agenda of higher taxes and forced Government-Run Health Care!
To request a petition packet in the mail so you can circulate petitions and help Brian get on the ballot, please send me an email **Matt@brianfitzpatrick.com** or reach me at **(305) 613-6651** with any questions. Be sure to provide your county and address where you would like to circulate. The official period for candidates to circulate petitions and gather signatures begins today, Tuesday, January 28th and we are working to have all of our signatures collected by Friday, February 13th. The petitions can be dropped off at the Bucks County Republican Party headquarters, 115 N Broad St, Doylestown, PA 18901.
There have been some big changes to the petition circulation process this year. First, you can now circulate a petition anywhere as long as you live in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania and are a registered Republican; however, only registered Republicans within the 1st Congressional District may sign a petition. Secondly, petitions no longer require notarization. If you are going to copy or print petitions, please make sure they are double-sided and printed on regular white paper. Lastly, if you are unable to circulate but wish to sign a petition, you may [**download the petition form here**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=adc1e439edd042fbb088cc1e6cbde45d&_e=RD2J3yqd9S8wWVeBh7EpQWJrBAR157xQiWYBRY9qfyNEhQs7FgkTiduWZvvmmX8FRQHwHl9RaEHeY5rqS9apdYmHVUGs38j5VlhHHuPy6xeaQx91SQtd1rEPGO3u-cAEX8vhKNtbKVhK8zMpsNwseZyu9-CpQsH4qm_QTM390ZpCPQV3kGEiWYIhxMfkexdZ11aFUOHtARaxsA0namc7K7zuDyjNAr7B1wSI9lGcuU4Y7Qd_7UGz6wX530WVXQ6zV4jG8MCfL5NF98FPZ_5b8Q6VJi-RQEWsLLYdjUJA7Zl05oXrV9pyNH9s-Ry3m15fyZwSFEmSdzln7JxHLDGYxXENryEmwqz2GnK4xBJADUGkoEamPiOTBAXgAuCH-dPi), and send it back to Bucks County Republican Headquarters. **Please remember, the petitions need to be printed double-sided.**
We appreciate your support and help getting Brian back on the ballot. Let’s take the first step to fighting back against socialism together!
[ **PRINT THE PETITION** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=adc1e439edd042fbb088cc1e6cbde45d&_e=RD2J3yqd9S8wWVeBh7EpQWJrBAR157xQiWYBRY9qfyNEhQs7FgkTiduWZvvmmX8FRQHwHl9RaEHeY5rqS9apdYmHVUGs38j5VlhHHuPy6xeaQx91SQtd1rEPGO3u-cAEX8vhKNtbKVhK8zMpsNwseZyu9-CpQsH4qm_QTM390ZrurkOZhvDoezNBwnRyDaYKAwC_XNfzEF1bLAJClFrxn1SNR4KSZpxSVgyYDwgjvpYAq8CLVAh0xDhJSdjj4SgH4UIUraklDOyetNC1v-0vD-_KYy_d-Fc4IXYYDFSv521xMVI6LdvROuPFDNYYXGXdswgnLRS1K-x-bFB3MrLTWsU5MQy3IqmtTNZwmKBLgzyDy1uvTej7_tVR6OjL5bhZ) Thanks, Matt G. Campaign Manager

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047
This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this [link.](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_s=adc1e439edd042fbb088cc1e6cbde45d&_t=1mvTYZ6rwAiAiC9j0ZRL6xDZN9YsVpXTjhBlgITsc8krhE1xBZMOuaUFbpxfJTmMmeXZaCjViBflmzEW7xQAgtm8xKQUkpWZkT53-_FOLYkyzcLdX90_ngQ6hoQBxTwkPQTk5bKCAa3biohkVTfLlabU8qgxyucchTwr2Wt_SlI%3D)
[Privacy Policy](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=adc1e439edd042fbb088cc1e6cbde45d&_e=pBD8lzYmkVUMn72gFQt5HxFnBiV3KqZ2WfydrAA81RwOvTKUbDuxoq3owd90Re2yUxx6UTlewEdILhcw70OBjj2wgG2zQv9eDy72G3DgvnlorNqEDLSZduj5ymkupId-R28tuzSLiCqN2iJ38UkBSvmQ8hh2l5obhjPFi3-taS-ii5yaxBGYHF0z5W-XFkI2kZASpH3DkybePPIjEnXvIXaiHrDDZhmUIf1BXX-xG1LnBY11InoB9zZ7HL5489Scfj5Q6lY--EsuNcIfMjIxJ1oHUcSBU_uW9EDQox7NCl4%3D) \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

---
Peter,

We’ll get right to the point: We _need_ to elect J.D. Scholten to represent Iowa’s 4th District. It’s high time we had a member of Congress who actually represents Iowa's values and who will fight tirelessly for every single person in our district.

**[Show your commitment to electing J.D. by contributing $5 or more right now to get a Team Scholten digital membership card!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14388264/150783128/-1093747974?refcode=em20_200128_eom1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzJlOGRmMS0wYzQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwlsh3kCYPwsaT-b0AUilbeVvMGtHWGAfz-CkcypQaU=)**

---

Being on Team Scholten means you care about electing officials with a big heart and relentless determination. At every campaign stop, no matter how large or small the crowd size, J.D. connects with Iowans, listens to their concerns, and shows he won’t stop fighting for them in Congress.

Your investment early in 2020 means we can up our game and increase our resources across the district. We can visit more towns, reach more voters, and **win this election.**

**[Contribute $5 or more right now and get your Team Scholten digital membership card today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14388266/150783130/-1093747974?refcode=em20_200128_eom1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzJlOGRmMS0wYzQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwlsh3kCYPwsaT-b0AUilbeVvMGtHWGAfz-CkcypQaU=)**

\-- Team Scholten

It’s high time we had a member of Congress who actually represents Iowa's values and who will fight tirelessly for every single person in our district. = | = Being on Team Scholten means you care about electing officials with a big heart and relentless determination. At every campaign stop, no matter how large or small the crowd size, J.D. connects with Iowans, listens to their concerns, and shows he won’t stop fighting for them in Congress. Your investment early in 2020 means we can up our game and increase our resources across the district. We can visit more towns, reach more voters, and win this election. = Thanks for being a part of our team! \-- Team Scholten =

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Elizabeth Warren just endorsed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Growing up in Section 8 housing in the Village of Spring Valley, I never imagined I could one day run for Congress, or that a leading contender for the Presidency of the United States would take an interest in my campaign. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2ys/L8kMbpkNQsSoSOxBKJ36Gg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PxMeiPCgRNhXUv8gQ7zwIy5GIqIGeyV0cNdLJkjV40dxTg96pJAECd5keLoXZCEK-2B5ulE2j4u5nls4HiIXsmIN3w9petkX4jcnBsIEPZgYXzOgUwO3VJ5tybw3pXavF3-2Bfp6wxuNNm6nK2TeZ-2FU47bI/hJ_1)
Friend, **** **** **** Growing up in Section 8 housing in the Village of Spring Valley, I never imagined I would one day run for Congress, or that a leading contender for the Presidency of the United States would take an interest in my campaign. So I am humbled and honored to tell you that, today, Senator Elizabeth Warren officially endorsed our campaign.
_“Mondaire Jones knows that we’re in a fight to put power in the hands of working families,” said Elizabeth Warren. “With Mondaire in Congress, we’ll gain another chance to achieve the hard-fought wins that bring us closer to big, structural change, and I’m glad to stand with him.”_
Senator Warren recognizes that we need bold, progressive solutions to meet the urgent, existential problems we face as a society. She knows that I will be a tireless advocate for working families, and that I won’t be afraid to stand up to big corporations and special interests. Will you join Senator Warren in supporting my campaign by making a donation today?
[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2ys/L8kMbpkNQsSoSOxBKJ36Gg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL4UeuJQNS1hokkJRElXOZ0NUUWI7bQ-2BmhtJDQSfXgwN-2FK9dvhxBgKk2NpvPeUJXTEsC7cTH1TvN-2Fo9k-2FSo-2B4kkB7dWrZF1wm6yrg0OpzqSMojvY2UxdmcGH9yMUkD8We4kW3LBrfZGxEE4nxZH8LvJT0S2FE7tE8qiAbs5IPHspXm0CvKbyXAQZzGByI56KZobjUzvlW-2B50wtXZ-2Bi52rlbjAXXtxoJTK52BgHKWSk8Jg-3D-3D/qYpV)
This race has come a long way since I announced my campaign back in July. We’ve built a team from the ground up, recruited hundreds of volunteers, and started spreading our message by knocking on doors all across the district. We still have five months to go, but with the help of Senator Warren and supporters like you, we are going to deliver the change this country desperately needs.

clean_body: Growing up in Section 8 housing in the Village of Spring Valley, I never imagined I could one day run for Congress, or that a leading contender for the Presidency of the United States would take an interest in my campaign. | | | Friend, ** ** Growing up in Section 8 housing in the Village of Spring Valley, I never imagined I would one day run for Congress, or that a leading contender for the Presidency of the United States would take an interest in my campaign. So I am humbled and honored to tell you that, today, Senator Elizabeth Warren officially endorsed our campaign. “Mondaire Jones knows that we’re in a fight to put power in the hands of working families,” said Elizabeth Warren. “With Mondaire in Congress, we’ll gain another chance to achieve the hard-fought wins that bring us closer to big, structural change, and I’m glad to stand with him.” Senator Warren recognizes that we need bold, progressive solutions to meet the urgent, existential problems we face as a society. She knows that I will be a tireless advocate for working families, and that I won’t be afraid to stand up to big corporations and special interests. Will you join Senator Warren in supporting my campaign by making a donation today? This race has come a long way since I announced my campaign back in July. We’ve built a team from the ground up, recruited hundreds of volunteers, and started spreading our message by knocking on doors all across the district. We still have five months to go, but with the help of Senator Warren and supporters like you, we are going to deliver the change this country desperately needs. Thank you, Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Big Endorsement!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Montana
body:
Charlie Kirk Endorses Troy Downing | | | |
---
| | | **Charlie Kirk Endorses Troy Downing for State Auditor**
**_Downing is the Conservative That Can Win in November_** Bozeman, MONT.-Charlie Kirk, founder of Turning Point USA, has endorsed businessman and combat veteran Troy Downing in the race for Montana State Auditor. According to Charlie Kirk, **_“Troy is a fierce advocate for transparency in government. He will be an unmatched champion for Montana’s State Lands and will fight hard for lower prescription drug prices and affordable healthcare.”_** Turning Point USA was formed by Charlie Kirk in 2012 and has become the leading voice and defender of Conservatives on college campuses. Charlie Kirk, alongside Donald Trump, Jr., campaigned in Montana on multiple occasions during the 2018 US Senate election. **_“I’m honored to receive this outpouring of support. Charlie is a leader in the Conservative movement and one of the strongest advocates for President Trump.” _**Downing goes on to say, **_“This has become a targeted race nationally because Conservatives like Charlie Kirk understand that we must lower prescription drug prices for hardworking Montana families and retain this seat on the Land Board.”_** Downing has also received the endorsement of former Billings District Court Judge and US Senate Candidate Judge Russ Fagg. According to Fagg, **_“Troy Downing is the Conservative that can win in November. He has my full support.” _** Other notable endorsements include State Senator Al Olszewski, Attorney General Tim Fox, Former Congressman Denny Rehberg, Former US Senate Candidate Ron Murray, Senator Ed Buttrey, Senator Cary Smith, Senator Duane Ankney, Senator David Howard, Former State Representative Jim Pattelis, and Agriculture Broadcaster Lane Nordlund. Montana Speaker of the House Greg Hertz has also endorsed the Troy Downing for Auditor Team stating, **_“Troy’s commitment to Montana and our country along with his leadership skills in business and as a member of our military provides him the skills to lead Montana as our next Commissioner of Securities and Insurance."_** Conservatives are rallying behind Troy Downing because they understand that he is the only Conservative that can go head to head with the Democrat and win in November.According to Downing’s Campaign Manager Sam Loveridge, **_“With this level of support, it’s clear that Troy Downing is the only Republican that can beat the Democrat in November. As a businessman, combat veteran, and proven conservative Troy has the experience and courage to get the job done on the Land Board and in the Auditors Office.”_**
---

**To be blunt: Mark is facing a tough election**. As we approach the first fundraising deadline of 2020, we're asking for your help so we can start out strong.

Here are just a few reasons **[Mark needs your support this year](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d670/53d9897e/534076a2/1c89a638/2072335390/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-janeomnd?refcode=20200128_f_1_nd__443__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")** :
1. **The Trump campaign is determined to win Virginia**. They've established the well-funded Trump Victory Initiative to help them do it -- and they've already held over 80 events in the Commonwealth.

2. **A battleground state poll shows Donald Trump WINNING Virginia in several scenarios**. And he's paying attention. He recently tweeted: "Republicans will win Virginia in 2020."

3. **Single donors can now give as much as $580,600 to support Donald Trump 's re-election**. This agreement between a joint fundraising committee for the Trump campaign and the RNC intentionally disadvantages Democratic candidates. It's especially worrying for Virginia Democrats like Mark who are already battling the Trump Victory Initiative.

4. **The polling experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ rate Virginia's partisan lean as _completely even_** (the only state in the country with that rating!), meaning this race could truly go either way.

This election isn't a sure thing. We need to expand our reach -- open more field offices, hire more staff, and organize more volunteers to make sure every voter across Virginia hears how Mark is fighting for them in the Senate. **[Will you donate now so we can meet our $15,000 fundraising goal this month and keep going strong all the way to November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d670/53d9897e/534076a2/1c89a627/2072335390/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-janeomnd?refcode=20200128_f_1_nd__443__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Bruce Sinclair
Campaign Manager

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d670/53d9897e/534076a2/1c89a626/2072335390/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-janeomnd?refcode=20200128_f_1_nd__443__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President’s Legal Team Presents First Full Day of Defense Arguments
body:
“Asking a foreign leader to get to the bottom of issues of corruption is not a violation of an oath.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d612fdd7b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President’s Legal Team Presents First Full Day of Defense Arguments**

President Trump’s legal team yesterday set the record straight on unsubstantiated media leaks and reminded senators of the consequences of using impeachment to settle policy disputes, Ebony Bowden and Steven Nelson report for the _New York Post_.

“We live in a constitutional republic where you have deep policy concerns and deep differences that should not be the basis of an impeachment,” attorney Jay Sekulow said.

“Asking a foreign leader to get to the bottom of issues of corruption is not a violation of an oath.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e187cacd35&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [Biden corruption concerns called "nepotistic at best, nefarious at worst"](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8e2d5fa95&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Eighty seconds. That’s how long it took for a CNN panel to show just what they think of President Donald Trump’s supporters. CNN anchor Don Lemon, frequent CNN guest Rick Wilson and New York Times op-ed writer Wajahat Ali (who is also a CNN contributor) rolled out nearly every possible stereotype about Republican voters in a segment that aired Saturday night,” Peter Hasson writes for _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0adb21f788&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “The House of Representatives’ handling of the impeachment of President Donald Trump has inflicted serious damage on America’s constitutional system of government and threatened the very safety of our nation. The partisan nature of this particular impeachment will end up weakening not just Mr. Trump, but the office of the presidency,” Heritage Foundation President Kay Coles James writes in _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2bfe48c1fc&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| President Trump plans to unveil his vision for Middle East peace at a White House event today. The 50+-page blueprint addresses “how to resolve core issues on borders, security and the status of Jerusalem, [and] has been in development since 2017,” Felicia Schwartz and Michael R. Gordon report for _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c7d1a4384&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: I stand with NPR (and the free press)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f9d8/6cd27893/532dc514/158629f0/236324579/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | When Secretary of State Mike Pompeo attacked NPR reporter Mary Louise Kelly and impugned her for doing her job, he stepped way over a line that Secretaries of State should never get near. She had the _shocking temerity_ to ask him questions about Ukraine that he didn't want to answer after giving his staff advance warning she might ask him questions about Ukraine. That's a good journalist's job. **At a time when dictators and strongmen around the world are imprisoning and killing journalists and using cries of "fake news" to justify it, U.S. foreign policy needs to include a robust defense of freedom of the press.** Instead our top diplomat is encouraging the demonization of inconvenient media because he was asked some hard questions. He's even barred NPR from flying with the U.S. delegation on an upcoming trip overseas. As an elected official, I've had my disagreements with members of the press from time to time. But it is the very freedom of the press that stands as a bulwark against fascism and tyranny. Secretary Pompeo needs to understand that his role is to defend American values around the world, and that includes protecting the freedom of journalists to ask difficult questions of those who are given the high responsibility of governing this country. [**Please join me and tell Mike Pompeo: American freedom depends on a free press.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f9d8/6cd27893/532dc514/158629f1/236324579/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/free-press/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-free-press-email") _Jeff_ [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f9d8/6cd27893/532dc514/158629f1/236324579/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/free-press/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-free-press-email") |

That's a good journalist's job. At a time when dictators and strongmen around the world are imprisoning and killing journalists and using cries of "fake news" to justify it, U.S. foreign policy needs to include a robust defense of freedom of the press. Instead our top diplomat is encouraging the demonization of inconvenient media because he was asked some hard questions. He's even barred NPR from flying with the U.S. delegation on an upcoming trip overseas. As an elected official, I've had my disagreements with members of the press from time to time. But it is the very freedom of the press that stands as a bulwark against fascism and tyranny. Secretary Pompeo needs to understand that his role is to defend American values around the world, and that includes protecting the freedom of journalists to ask difficult questions of those who are given the high responsibility of governing this country. "" Jeff "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. ---|--- | ""

name: Team Markey
subject: Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NRDC Action Fund and Peace Action just endorsed Ed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We just got major news.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de40/693b8b0a/435ef4b5/72de4986/3448230648/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
We just got major news.
The Planned Parenthood Action Fund, the NRDC Action Fund, and Peace Action all endorsed Ed.
The momentum and grassroots energy in this race are behind us, and we need to keep it going.
We want to demonstrate the incredible grassroots strength behind this campaign. That's why we're asking you to personally endorse Ed:
[**Add your name right now to say you are #StickingWithEd. Together, we will make it clear that the people are behind Ed in this race.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de40/693b8b0a/435ef4b5/72de4985/3448230648/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em200128-a")
These groups all endorsed Ed because they know he's always been a progressive champion.
From climate to reproductive freedom to peace, he has been with these movements in every fight, and he leads on the most important issues of our time.
If we want to pass the Green New Deal, prevent war with Iran and stop the threat of nuclear weapons, and pass Medicare for all, then we need Ed in the Senate.
That will not happen unless we build the largest progressive, people-powered movement that Massachusetts has ever seen. Step one in that process is knowing that you're with us.
[**Will you add your name to personally endorse Ed? The battle ahead will not be easy, but if enough of us make our voices heard to say we are sticking with Ed, then we are going to win.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de40/693b8b0a/435ef4b5/72de4985/3448230648/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em200128-a")
Our race is going to be one of the fights that defines 2020. The only way we will win on our shared progressive agenda is if we do this together.
This is such an important moment for our movement to show that we are behind Ed all the way.
\- Team Markey
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de40/693b8b0a/435ef4b5/72de4985/3448230648/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em200128-a")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee

It’s hard to believe, but In just a few short days we’ll be finishing up the first month of the year.

You may have seen my opponent, Ross Spano, in the news lately. He's the **only member of Congress currently under criminal investigation**. Even so, he'll do anything to win reelection. That's what makes the end of this month so important.

**This is the first time this year that the health of our campaign will be on full display. We need to show that we have what it takes to stand up to Ross Spano, his goons, and all of the DC dark money that surrounds them.**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: New polls shake up Iowa Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, A series of new polls have come out showing Senator Bernie Sanders on top of national and state polls a week ahead of the Iowa Caucus, beating previous frontrunner Vice President Joe Biden. A _New York Times_ /Siena College survey showed Sanders netting 25% of the votes, with Buttigieg at 18%, Biden at 17%, and Warren at 15%. However, the nomination is still anyone's guess. Senate Elizabeth Warren received the coveted _Des Moines Register_ endorsement, boosting her prospects before the first primary election of the 2020 cycle. With the nomination race still wide open and Trump's approval rating holding steady at 43% despite the impeachment trial, we need to know what Democrats are thinking: **Will you vote against Trump in November?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfae/6e9863e8/82a521b/1db06c70/1207395717/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/uhlN0hOI") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfae/6e9863e8/82a521b/1db06c70/1207395717/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/uhlN0hOI") Thank you for your response, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfae/6e9863e8/82a521b/1db06c77/1207395717/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200128b.ND&refcode2=3BTXi49f54obno7uyzqj")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: I visited Israel to get a firsthand look at the settlements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Recently I traveled to Israel with the goal of gaining a better understanding of the country and the challenges it faces. | | | |
---
|
---
| Recently I traveled to Israel with the goal of gaining a better understanding of the country and the challenges it faces.

Israel is one of our most important allies in the middle east, and President Trump needs an unwavering coalition of supporters standing with his administration's policies to foster peace in that region.

[Our current Congressman from the 2nd district has already failed him in that regard. Read the full text of the article](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e9c6e97f75&e=1050d051da).
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=89ce9eec92&e=1050d051da)
---
| | | President Trump needs the strongest negotiating hand possible to work toward peace in Israel. Representative Watkins' decision to side with Democrats and vote to undercut the President's Middle East policies is indefensible and jeopardizes peace.

I continue to be in complete agreement with President Trump and Secretary Pompeo that the thousands of Israelis who live and work in these thriving communities have a legal right to continue to live there peacefully.

As your next Congressman, you can count on me to stand strong on this issue along with vigorously defending our Kansas values and the security of our nation.

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner
---
| [SHOW YOUR SUPPORT TODAY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=525628a744&e=1050d051da "SHOW YOUR SUPPORT TODAY")

subject: Guess what today is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
Today is Election Day, and
we don't have a moment to lose. Here's what we need you to do:

Step 1: [ http://act.betoorourke.com/go/pbp-join-slack?t=1001&akid=78194%2E444211%2EI0dbY6 ]Join our call team RIGHT NOW and hop on our dialer to make
calls for Eliz. It doesn’t matter if you’re from Fort Bend or
Englewood — each new volunteer means an additional HUNDRED more
voters contacted on average.

Step 2: Reach out to ANY friends of yours in Texas HD 28 and [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42157?t=1002&akid=78194%2E444211%2EI0dbY6 ]share this
page with them to make sure they have a plan to vote!

Step 3: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42158?refcode=ema20200128-78194&t=1003&akid=78194%2E444211%2EI0dbY6 ]Make an emergency contribution today and continue to fund our
GOTV software and voter turnout program.

Step 4: Most importantly, remember that no matter what happens — win or
lose — we have a lot to be proud of: 41,000 doors knocked, 1,100 unique
volunteers hailing from 155 different cities in 19 different states.
That's incredible.

We’ve proven that our grassroots powered model not only works on big
Senate races like Beto’s in 2018, but on elections like this one in Fort
Bend.

Now let’s leave everything out there and bring home a win for Eliz and
working families all over Texas!

- Powered By People

body:
Hey, it's Andrew, the finance director for Greg's re-election campaign team,

Yesterday, our campaign shared with you that we have our first major fundraising deadline of 2020 this Friday and we are trying to raise contributions from 100 online, grassroots donors who haven't given yet in 2020.

[**Can we count on you to contribute before our Friday deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CxOT-dzWYvocuemmB5K_awEgGQggiD1Nplj9AnPkX3I=/NGcQ_9H3UDP0GpKg_d6YFjU2THTr54Th1BbW1R3ctEA=?refcode=X_012820_EOM_B&amount=50&recurring=auto)

We know national dark money special interest groups are planning to spend MILLIONS in Arizona in 2020, so we need to make sure Greg has the resources he needs to fight back.

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: We have the Momentum!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
**BREAKING NEWS! EricaForUS has the Momentum!**

I am excited that these last two weeks have been absolutely incredible for my campaign! After an extensive review process, I am proud to announce the honor of being endorsed by each of the following grassroots, people-powered organizations:

* People's Alliance of Durham (PA)
* Durham Committee on the Affairs of Black People (DCABP)
* State Employees Association of North Carolina (SEANC); an affiliate of the SEIU
* Equality NC (ENC)
* Raleigh Wake Citizens Association (RWCA)

These added endorsements represent the increasing momentum for EricaForUS and the affirmation of my people-powered message and mission! I would say it is time to celebrate, but **I really need your help now more than ever before**. Being the front-runner in 7 out of the last 8 polls and with this new avalanche of endorsers joining the team, now I really need your support to fend off efforts by my challengers to get back into the race while I also plan for the important stretch run to Early Voting and the Primary.

**I am planning our statewide push to Get Out The Vote and I have some exciting initiatives and events planned. **

My ground game will be critical. I need the resources to develop the best, most comprehensive GOTV plan that connects with and drives a massive voter turnout from the start of Early Voting on February 13th through the Primary on March 3rd. By donating as much as you can today, you can help ensure that I keep the momentum AND that I can get our voters to the polls when it matters.

Please donate to my campaign today. Any amount is appreciated. I need your support to become the next U.S. Senator from the great state of North Carolina. I am One of US for ALL OF US and I will continue to fight for the progressive issues that you believe in when I get to Washington, D.C.

**We have the momentum! Now let's push to the finish line! **

#EricaForUS

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zRsz-j5zB7A_AfdPBDSidZ3qHSrrdX6dnlU0JWNIi0E=/RHhIc0zXxpI-LeaNsB0TanfW-_lGOW6_5EbRMbBPdAI=)

[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/zRsz-j5zB7A_AfdPBDSidZ3qHSrrdX6dnlU0JWNIi0E=/RHhIc0zXxpI-LeaNsB0TanfW-_lGOW6_5EbRMbBPdAI=)
{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/zRsz-j5zB7A_AfdPBDSidZ3qHSrrdX6dnlU0JWNIi0E=/BNwa22BqG3eL0HSgY1aBxuLBygh8AzxKxyM7ni61zVg=).
