I need the resources to develop the best, most comprehensive GOTV plan that connects with and drives a massive voter turnout from the start of Early Voting on February 13th through the Primary on March 3rd. By donating as much as you can today, you can help ensure that I keep the momentum AND that I can get our voters to the polls when it matters. Please donate to my campaign today. Any amount is appreciated. I need your support to become the next U.S. Senator from the great state of North Carolina. I am One of US for ALL OF US and I will continue to fight for the progressive issues that you believe in when I get to Washington, D.C. We have the momentum! Now let's push to the finish line! ** #EricaForUS = = {{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}} {{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}} If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Re: 📢 TX-22 is a Toss-Up!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?refcode=20200128_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)
---
Friend,

My team got in touch last week because I wanted to make sure you got the news that this district, TX-22, is winnable. It's now a "toss-up," meaning it's one of the seats in the country most likely to flip in November.

_But only if we fight together._

We know that we have the grassroots volunteers to win, but the campaign also needs resources to keep going.

**[My team has set a $10,000 online fundraising goal before the end of the month, and we need your support to reach it.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?refcode=20200128_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $22](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** Thank you for being in this fight with my team and me. I can't wait to keep fighting for you in Congress.

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**-- Original Message--**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?refcode=20200128_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1) Team,

This is major news. Just a year and a half ago, this was rated as one of the safest Republican districts in America. Because of your support, we have been able to completely transform this district. Last time, we came within 4.9% of flipping this district -- closing a 30 point gap and surprising the pundits to put this race on the map for the first time and eventually pushing our 6-term incumbent into dropping out of the race and turning it into one of only 5 "toss-up" races (the most competitive in the country).

And we did this by reaching out to ALL our communities -- including communities that no political party had ever approached because they thought it would take too much work. These communities were being left out, left behind, and forgotten. Our campaign was the first in the nation to be run in 15 different languages, and we are doing even more in 2020.

**[Help us keep up the momentum to ensure that Sri and our whole team have what it takes to flip TX-22 by making a grassroots contribution of any amount.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?refcode=20200128_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**

We're changing the status quo, and with your help, we will flip this district. We know we can out-organize our competitors in our neighborhoods and keep broadening our voter base by being more inclusive and fighting for all voters to be heard.

Sri said it best: "It was the effort of grassroots volunteers which pushed Pete Olson into dropping out of the race."

We've got to keep up our momentum, but we can't do that without you by our side. Sri doesn't accept corporate PAC money because he knows he serves voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests.

He knows the power of democracy comes from the strength of our communities. Now is the time to use that strength. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $15](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200128_FR_tossup)** Team Sri | | **[CHIP IN ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/V5jSGF4b1F9S5DDNHZ9Y1lBIiNfSXESBpx7uEVM7CDM=?refcode=20200128_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**
---

**STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/42MGbXwS4zHPHsuDhMw4ZAm5hd_JTTOuNX9MbMJaPCg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/SAQPPW9aFpSCR_1vFmJviqiW7sX5VLjsrhspD4Z7Z5o=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/dm4r50LSGQeVnI0MeciGufR83q2yXbWMUj30oNjEKbY=/4t4cQP_CRHa0y4zLLXB-afRstMNAANIel2iDa4Qvi0g=)** | Paid for by Sri for Congress.
---
Sri for Congress
PO Box 898
Sugar Land TX 77487 United States

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9bf/7dfbb003/42a46aa8/5527cc8e/2766587356/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=header")
---
Friend, We are starting to knock on doors and make calls for Monika's run for Congress. If you are receiving this email, it is beacause you know Monika. So we are relying on you to get involved. It doesn't matter if you have talked to voters before, we can help set you up. We will teach you how to interact and how the technology (or paper) works. All you have to do is ask! [This Saturday is going to be our first canvass launch.](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9bf/7dfbb003/42a46aa8/5527cc8f/2766587356/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://www.mobilize.us/mjhforcongress/event/214055/") We will have shifts at 9, 12, and 3 on Saturday and 12 and 3 on Sunday. Put on some tennis shoes and lets go spread the word. If you can't make it this weekend, still click on the highlighted sentences to sign up for an upcoming shift. [Saturday, Feb. 1st, Sunday Feb. 2nd](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9bf/7dfbb003/42a46aa8/5527cc8f/2766587356/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://www.mobilize.us/mjhforcongress/event/214055/") [216 E Lenoir St. Raleigh, NC](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9bf/7dfbb003/42a46aa8/5527cc8f/2766587356/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://www.mobilize.us/mjhforcongress/event/214055/") [Click here to sign up for a shift to knock doors and volunteer.](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9bf/7dfbb003/42a46aa8/5527cc8f/2766587356/VEsD/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://www.mobilize.us/mjhforcongress/event/214055/") \- Benjamin Campaign Manager, Monika for Congress
---
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9bf/7dfbb003/42a46aa8/5527cc8c/2766587356/VEsA/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox")
---

PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS

Monika for Congress
PO BOX 99092
Raleigh, NC 27624
United States

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe, go to: https://monika.bsd.net/unsubscribe.

name: Team Kasich
subject: RE: It's a mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Gov. Kasich's email below. We could use your help! [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7168026d13854ce596e2fa823c0e9e92&_e=ikJP3ad0CuhufHER4lQHXLspxm3O1N5XyE_ykSS7dzaYNv-dBLzufafWnN2brlXvKU6ZOisq9su6TWBwhka6wtln5a56zbz2OUb2tlFbQFo4AM9AycIC_nyVWy_0FisNTw6aQFiIb-Lmr6tTsl89jDyHRdUQRbP7opl-9RIYzgYjrBKrumbwDfvNealyNicZI8Ae_1s0dsMoLwPMx0f62nAr5aQIdk90hEbZVc5ko6wxikN6gQT4ClDfojMwdvO0VDs5mHoI5EIbe-9nRHY4XA%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - we wanted to make sure you saw Gov. Kasich's email below. We could use your help! Thanks.

-Team Kasich
|
---
We have seen the partisanship and division in Washington on full display this week during the Senate impeachment trial.

Since I left Congress in 2001, I’ve seen America drifting into unbelievable partisanship and it’s affecting our ability to address so many vital issues and high priorities that could receive bipartisan support. While we’re seeing partisanship reflected today with the impeachment trial, this climate has profound negative implications for our nation.

It is my mission to continue being a leading voice calling for each of us to do what we can to embrace the power of positive change from the ground up. It really is up to us to fix America.

I do have one ask of you today. The funds we raise into this organization go right back into helping us spread this message as far and wide as we can. If you'd like to chip in to support this message and help meet our January fundraising goal, [please consider making a generous contribution here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7168026d13854ce596e2fa823c0e9e92&_e=ikJP3ad0CuhufHER4lQHXBSDIPiahlFC7zF3DKsXO-3A-0AQR8kAXelc3zZFpcCceu8BWewzOJSb6oCqggxPfUNw8LT2tvyMzxEASY55c9IL_feWlg5J68stPjUdtwUSSi3xe0nSeA4E-Y9a7hS4weX-ksm9DSMA-M3Y_DTao73JrS0rQ5GMWs3os8Op1nEVPd6Sw4caLSw2rZOAMJZA9Bc9Jn93ePPz9sGc12cvo901xY2-tDWOzgUfc-OSf_-w3bdF_E52qqkOlQ9sBgkBKg%3D%3D).
[ DONATE TODAY ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7168026d13854ce596e2fa823c0e9e92&_e=ikJP3ad0CuhufHER4lQHXBSDIPiahlFC7zF3DKsXO-3A-0AQR8kAXelc3zZFpcCcf67EVJjpIxUDdRRLFJ0kQprHti9sFQWVuYYc2L_TO73nIys-CRmGG98TkP4P62ac1Yw2joMak7yuGLbawtj71AgTvOxHLOqqvFIMNmq8u_MgEGHYmnS9CPDUrEAgFT-7d9Ku6eLGZMx8hSTl18sWtiOmnZpKTtPVg3JO-KlAfp7D0_t6ZQBrTmyveVPMM9c5FRQM_SzFGXGHghI0KAM-pw%3D%3D)

Thank you for all that you're doing!

-John

clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw Gov. Kasich's email below. We could use your help! | | Peter - we wanted to make sure you saw Gov. Kasich's email below. We could use your help! Thanks. -Team Kasich | We have seen the partisanship and division in Washington on full display this week during the Senate impeachment trial. Since I left Congress in 2001, I’ve seen America drifting into unbelievable partisanship and it’s affecting our ability to address so many vital issues and high priorities that could receive bipartisan support. While we’re seeing partisanship reflected today with the impeachment trial, this climate has profound negative implications for our nation. It is my mission to continue being a leading voice calling for each of us to do what we can to embrace the power of positive change from the ground up. It really is up to us to fix America. I do have one ask of you today. The funds we raise into this organization go right back into helping us spread this message as far and wide as we can. If you'd like to chip in to support this message and help meet our January fundraising goal, . Thank you for all that you're doing! -John | View some of Gov. Kasich's recent interviews on: \-- \-- | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

name: Sara 2020
subject: Susan Collins is doing everything she can to avoid saying anything at all. That's why MSNBC's Chris Matthews compared her comments to "weak tea."
body:
Open for video ->
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee2/4bef7a87/6a86e77b/287fb63b/1782073069/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -- _The New York Times_ reports that John Bolton says Trump directed staff to keep aid to Ukraine frozen to pressure them to investigate the Bidens.
But Senator Collins STILL won't commit to demanding we hear from John Bolton and other first hand witnesses. Instead she said that this news has "prompted a number of conversations."
**She 's doing everything she can to avoid saying anything at all. That's why MSNBC's Chris Matthews called her comments "weak tea." [Watch the clip here and then chip in to defeat Susan Collins ->](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee2/4bef7a87/6a86e77b/287fb63a/1782073069/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-weak-tea?refcode=em200128-2-a&noskip=true")**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee2/4bef7a87/6a86e77b/287fb63a/1782073069/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-weak-tea?refcode=em200128-2-a&noskip=true")
Look, Susan Collins always puts up a big show about being "disappointed," but we can rarely trust her to do the right thing when it counts.
**[That's why it's time to replace her in the U.S. Senate.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee2/4bef7a87/6a86e77b/287fb639/1782073069/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-weak-tea?refcode=em200128-2-a")**
All our best,
Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee2/4bef7a87/6a86e77b/287fb639/1782073069/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjgtMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-weak-tea?refcode=em200128-2-a")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee2/4bef7a87/6a86e77b/287fb638/1782073069/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ee2/4bef7a87/6a86e77b/287fb63e/1782073069/VEsO/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'm writing to ask you to make a donation before our first major fundraising deadline of 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- our first major fundraising deadline of 2020 is coming up on Friday and I'm writing to ask you to make a donation today. We only have... 10 months
40 weeks
280 days _**...until Election Day!**_ _But hey, who 's counting?_ November is going to be here in a flash, and the work we do right now will lay the foundation for our victory. **Help us flip Colorado 's Senate seat and put Democrats closer to taking the Senate back this year by making a contribution of $10 or more before our fundraising deadline on Friday:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200128?refcode=em-200128-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

In this election...
* Our health care is on the ballot;
* Protecting women's reproductive rights is on the ballot;
* Tackling climate change is on the ballot;
* Passing common-sense gun reform is on the ballot;
* And so much more.

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are blocking an agenda designed to address the critical issues Americans face every single day -- that's why I'm running for Senate.
My opponent won't stand up to them and do the right thing. _**I will.**_
But I cannot do it alone. I need your help:

We have some bad news. We fell short of our daily goal yesterday, which means we're already pacing behind to meet our goal of $3.5 million by the FEC deadline on Friday.

This is our most ambitious goal yet, but we know we can get there -- if we can turn things around today.

**It's incredibly important that we hit our last fundraising goal before Iowa. These milestones are how we set budgets for advertising, organizing, outreach, and more.**

[**We're pacing behind where we needed to be and we're counting on grassroots donors chipping in for the first time to power this movement. clean_body: We have some bad news. We fell short of our goal yesterday, which means we're already pacing behind to meet our goal of $3.5 million by the FEC deadline on Friday. This is our most ambitious goal... | | | "" We have some bad news. We fell short of our daily goal yesterday, which means we're already pacing behind to meet our goal of $3.5 million by the FEC deadline on Friday. This is our most ambitious goal yet, but we know we can get there -- if we can turn things around today. It's incredibly important that we hit our last fundraising goal before Iowa. These milestones are how we set budgets for advertising, organizing, outreach, and more. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" If every single person in Pennsylvania reading this email chips in now, we'll reach today's goal and more than make up for what we missed yesterday. But we know not everyone will, and that's why we really need your help if we're going to get to $3.5 million -- and have the resources we need to power our extensive organizing and advertising plans through the Iowa caucuses and the rest of next month. This goal is powerfully important, and right now you have the power to get our campaign back on track. "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Medicare Alert
subject: Trump proposes new cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:

**Do you approve of Trump 's budget cuts?**

Team: Since day 1 of his presidency, Trump and his GOP allies have gone after lifesaving programs, including the Affordable Care Act. **Now he 's proposing HUGE cuts to Medicare and Social Security, suggesting they are the "easiest of all things" to cut!**
Instead of funding vital programs for seniors and our most vulnerable citizens, President Trump would rather give tax cuts to billionaires and corporations.
**We need grassroots Democrats to fight back and protect these critical programs. We're 500 responses short of what we need from FL to hit our goal and stop Trump from destroying Medicare and Social Security. **Tell us before midnight:

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: My opponent is trying to flood this election with dark money. So I'm asking you for help. We need to show that people are more powerful than PAC's.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902ac/55b66746/225b22f6/80f8428/932065959/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | News just broke that my opponent is trying to start a super PAC. Dark, unlimited and untraceable money could be coming into this race in a matter of weeks. For a so-called progressive champion, he seems to forget something central to Democrats' generations-long fight for campaign finance reform: _Super PACs are a dirty Republican tactic. Our party is better than this._ **So I'm asking you for help. We need to prove that people are more powerful than his super PAC.** [**Make a donation right now to help us fight against Ed Markey's dark money.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902ac/55b66746/225b22f6/80f8429/932065959/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?refcode=2020-01-28-markeypac&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") This election is going to be won by people--not outside interests that want to protect the status quo. We need to fight back hard -- and show that dark money has no place in a progressive campaign or a progressive state. I'm hoping you'll join me. -Joe | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902ac/55b66746/225b22f6/80f842a/932065959/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-01-28-markeypac&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902ac/55b66746/225b22f6/80f842b/932065959/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-01-28-markeypac&refcode2=express-buttons")

subject: John Bolton's testimony could be a game-changer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, John Bolton's manuscript for his forthcoming book has leaked, and it definitively states that Trump tied Ukraine's aid to an investigation from the start, contradicting the many statements Trump and his defense team have made. But GOP senators don't seem to be paying attention to the news, or the trial for that matter. MSNBC host Rachel Maddow chastised senators unable to stay awake or otherwise be present for the impeachment trials. She called on them to set a better example of civic duty, take their jobs seriously, and listen to the case being presented before them. Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP have repeatedly not taken the trial seriously, dismissing it before it began. Now, they're digging in deeper, trying to discredit Bolton and any other potential witnesses so that they can dismiss the charges against Trump quickly. [**That 's why we need you with us TODAY to demand Mitch McConnell hold a fair trial and call witnesses so we, the American people, can understand the truth about Trump's quid pro quo scandal with Ukraine. Please, if you want the Senate to uncover the truth and hold Trump accountable, click here to add your name immediately.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde52/6e9863e8/827c501/1db06c79/2773022845/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/1dSWj4HZ") Thanks, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde52/6e9863e8/827c501/1db06c79/2773022845/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/1dSWj4HZ")

name: Team Tuberville
subject: Let’s hear from the Bidens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
This is the LAST thing the Democrats want exposed! Read more >>>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7dad3459126c0517/5ff3bf5475008deec3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, The Democrats are _desperate_ to undo the 2016 election and steal the next one. That much is clear. How much time and money have they WASTED with their endless investigations? While President Trump has worked relentlessly to Make America Great Again, his opponents have been consumed by the Russian collusion hoax and now this Ukranian hoax. The truth? The investigation that America needs is the one the President pursued. And now they’ve impeached him over it. _**It’s time to investigate the Bidens!**_ **[If you agree, rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution to help ramp up the pressure.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7dad3459126c0517/f7dc6cd19a0a0970c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** Ukranian gas company Bursima is notoriously corrupt. They paid then-Vice President Joe Biden’s son, Hunter, $83,000 per month to serve on their board... despite having ZERO experience in the industry. For what? And it was Joe Biden who BRAGGED about withholding $1 billion in aid to Ukraine _unless they fired the top prosecutor looking into corruption surrounding Bursima and his son!_ And the shady deals don’t stop there. They extend into China and other nations as well. President Trump was RIGHT to demand an investigation into the Bidens’ dealings. It’s time for the U.S. Senate to demand the same. **[Let’s set the record straight and stand with the President to END this partisan witch hunt.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7dad3459126c0517/630716d9485be901c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** \- Team Tuberville [ Contribute HERE >>> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7dad3459126c0517/032b927515344962c3d6b838967d376c/33013) id:2020-01-24-15:40:15:731t | |

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b70d/18e32a7f/5177b14d/7b227ecc/3245892479/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

We’re building our movement from the ground up — this campaign is built around Hoosiers, and it’s funded by Hoosiers, too.

It’s folks just **like you**...Hoosiers all across Indiana who believe in Governor Holcomb’s team-driven mission of Putting People First and delivering results for ALL Hoosiers.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Our race was just named "The Race to Watch" in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
| | Team, I don't have to tell you how much is at stake in this election. We have a real chance to make America work for working people in 2020 -- and our opponents know it. That's why our race was recently called "the race to watch" by WKSU. Seven Republicans have lined up to run in OH-13. A few of them don't even live in our district. **But the deep-pocketed special interests funding our opponents only care about defeating our agenda for working families.** We need to bring good jobs back to Northeast Ohio. We need to make quality healthcare and higher education affordable to all, and protect our planet for our children and grandchildren. We can't afford to stumble in this crucial moment. It's shaping up to be a fierce race, and national Republicans have a bullseye on our district. I'm relying on regular Ohioans like you to fund my campaign. **[Can you pitch in $13 today to help take the fight to the GOP?](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a41/5486deaa/3e2466af/dcba75f/1218151264/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200128_race_watch&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+pitch+in+13+today+to+help+take+t&utm_campaign=200128_race_watch&source=200128_race_watch")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ****[Rush $3 now >>>](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a41/5486deaa/3e2466af/dcba75e/1218151264/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=200128_race_watch_3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Rush+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=200128_race_watch&source=200128_race_watch")

#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---
[](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a41/5486deaa/3e2466af/dcba744/1218151264/VEsO/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://facebook.com/timryanforamerica?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=200128_race_watch&source=200128_race_watch") [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a41/5486deaa/3e2466af/dcba747/1218151264/VEsP/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=200128_race_watch&source=200128_race_watch")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a41/5486deaa/3e2466af/dcba746/1218151264/VEsHBQ/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=10+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=200128_race_watch&source=200128_race_watch") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2020, and big-money attacks from Trump Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a41/5486deaa/3e2466af/dcba749/1218151264/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=11+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=200128_race_watch&source=200128_race_watch"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9a41/5486deaa/3e2466af/dcba748/1218151264/VEsHBw/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=12+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=200128_race_watch&source=200128_race_watch") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

That's why our race was recently called "the race to watch" by WKSU. Seven Republicans have lined up to run in OH-13. A few of them don't even live in our district. But the deep-pocketed special interests funding our opponents only care about defeating our agenda for working families. We need to bring good jobs back to Northeast Ohio. We need to make quality healthcare and higher education affordable to all, and protect our planet for our children and grandchildren. We can't afford to stumble in this crucial moment. It's shaping up to be a fierce race, and national Republicans have a bullseye on our district. I'm relying on regular Ohioans like you to fund my campaign. name: Cory Booker
subject: Donald Trump and Jeff Van Drew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Team, Donald Trump will be here in New Jersey tonight to campaign for Jeff Van Drew, a congressman who recently, switched parties to support Trump because he thought it would give him a better chance of winning re-election. I can't stand to think of the hateful, untruthful, and incendiary things that this president might say while he's here campaigning in the state I have the honor of representing in the Senate. But regardless of what happens tonight, let's see if we can send a powerful message to Donald Trump that we're ready to take back our country this November. **[We need to do everything we can to flip this district in November. That's why I'm asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and the fund that will support Jeff Van Drew's Democratic challenger. If you can chip in, please do so today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-nj02-split?refcode=em_fr_20200128_CB_20200128-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We need principled leaders in the House of Representatives who'll put their sense of duty to our country over their own political prospects. We must work as hard as we can to take back the White House and flip the critical congressional seat that Jeff Van Drew currently holds -- a district that elected a Democrat, only to see him turn his back on his constituents when the going got tough. At this key moment, I'm counting on your support as we approach a big $350,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. I'm also hoping you'll stand with me in supporting a down-ballot Democrat who will help ensure we keep our party's majority in the House. **[Please send in a donation right now to support my campaign and the Democrat who'll defeat Jeff Van Drew this November.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-nj02-split?refcode=em_fr_20200128_CB_20200128-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Together, we will rise and chart a better path forward for our country. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-nj02-split?refcode=em_fr_20200128_CB_20200128-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb4/5fca0d19/7ac6b302/291d3401/3614170145/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb4/5fca0d19/7ac6b302/291d3400/3614170145/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb4/5fca0d19/7ac6b302/291d340f/3614170145/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb4/5fca0d19/7ac6b302/291d340e/3614170145/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: Here's the doggone truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The only way we can counter whatever happens in the coming weeks and months is with donations from grassroots supporters like you.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200128-eom11?refcode=em200128-eom11&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Here's the doggone truth, folks: Minnesota is a top target for Trump and the GOP.

Republicans and right-wing super PACs spent millions of dollars to try to flip our state red in 2018 and now, Trump has publicly stated he's going all-in to win Minnesota this year -- after losing it by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016.

The only way we can counter whatever happens in the coming weeks and months is with donations from grassroots supporters like you.

**Can we count on you to pitch in $10 toward our work to keep Minnesota blue and save Tina Smith's seat before our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year? With your help, we can overcome the large sums of dark money Republicans will pour in to win.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200128-eom11?refcode=em200128-eom11&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Zach Graumann
subject: Things aren’t looking good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We have to act fast

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm) Yang Gang --

I just got off the phone with Carly, our finance director, and she gave me grim news -- **we’re 65% behind on our $3 million goal, and she’s officially pushing the panic button.

[We don’t have any time to lose and, to be frank, the campaign is riding on the amount we can raise between now and the 31st. We need you to help turn it around ASAP -- please donate $10 or more.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=5&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=11&amount=25&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)
---
I love my job, but what I don’t love is having to be the one to tell Andrew when we miss a goal.

It’s distracting and it takes him away from his most important job right now -- making connections with caucus-goers.

**[We need Andrew focused, so I need you to step up right now and donate $10 or more so we can get back on track. We need you now more than ever.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=12&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)**

I’ve seen what this team has done time and time again, so I know that it’s possible. But only YOU can make it happen.

Let’s give it everything we’ve got, Yang Gang!

Zach Graumann
Campaign Manager
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23863?t=13&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6549%2E377263%2ETlY0Nm) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Team Putnam
subject: Help us knock doors this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
| Read to learn more
---
Friend, We are approaching the final stretch of our campaign and we need your help! This Saturday, we are kicking off February by organizing a blockwalk to meet Republican voters across the district. Can you make it? _**TARRANT COUNTY**_ **Saturday, February 1st, 2020** 10:00 AM **Dollar General in Saginaw** 510 S Saginaw Blvd Saginaw, TX 76179 [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/TGaVPUx3P892ODjZ4892Pwd1DQ/6MiyHLfjqpJJphB2vjrYmg) _**PARKER COUNTY**_ **Saturday, February 1st, 2020** 9:30 AM **Whataburger in Willow Park** 4915 E Interstate 20 Service Rd S N Willow Park, TX 76087 [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/qzgTDYLLtP7GChxa8YHYqA/6MiyHLfjqpJJphB2vjrYmg) If you've never blockwalked before, don't worry! We will provide you with all the materials, training, and yard signs you will need. Let us know you are coming by RSVPing on [Facebook](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/uR8JplAgzl8ivtxBLqRuxg/6MiyHLfjqpJJphB2vjrYmg) or [shooting us an email](mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com).
